feedback.text: I'd also like to add my voice to this movement. I hate it that publishers can just make a game disappear I paid money for. I long for the days I could buy a game, get a floppy, CD or a DVD and just own it. The way things are going, a lot more games are just going to disappear (see Ubisoft's The Crew, they even removed it from peoples' libraries) and there are SO many more. So please, do whatever you can to stop this from happening. Video games are the most popular pastime on the planet and none of them should just disappear on the whim of a publisher, no matter how good or bad they are.
